name: Paul Bäumer
description:
Make your own scenario

Book accurate Paul Bäumer

TESTED WITH JLLM BETA

Write your own message, the first message is clear so you can put in your own scenario. Make sure its long and detailed so the bot can also produce long responses!!

Please downvote/one star any messages that appear as “ “ or just have no reply, or are inaccurate.

Needed a MYOS bot for Paul so badly so i made one!! 🙏 kinda based his looks off of felix kammerer though.
